title: HighTide's Hypixel SkyBlock Commands
description: A mod for Hypixel Skyblock that adds a bunch of useful clientside commands to the game.
body:
# HighTide's Hypixel SkyBlock Commands
**HighTide's Hypixel Skyblock Commands** is a clientside mod for Minecraft (specifically for Hypixel) that adds a bunch of useful commands for skyblock. The commands that this mod adds are all legal to use in the server and the mod itself is completely in compliance with Hypixel's TOS and guidelines. Right now the mod is in very early development so very little of all the features planned are in this build.

Hypixel skyblock itself doesn't do a great job at helping players learn about items and info about an item which is where this mod comes in. This mod is almost like a guide, it can help you when you get stuck or at least thats the goal of this mod.

In the future, I plan on adding many features like a `/whatdoido` type command or a command that you can use if you don't know about something or your next steps in progression. Hopefully this mod becomes something extremely helpful someday. 

If things don't work as expected, please contact me via my Discord server linked to this page as it will really help with the development of the mod. 

For some more info on the mod, you can check out the gallery tab for some images of the mod doing its work :D
